title: Replace local AI analysis with external REST API integration

requirements.text: Remove all local AI analysis logic from the frontend. Delete or disable mock analysis generation code in ProcessingScreen.tsx that creates simulated results.

quotes: Modificar o app para NÃO fazer a análise local
Separar frontend da lógica de IA

acceptanceCriteria: ProcessingScreen.tsx no longer generates mock analysis data locally
All simulated delay logic for fake AI processing is removed
Frontend depends entirely on external API responses for analysis results

requirements.text: Create a new API service module (frontend/src/services/analysisApi.ts) that handles HTTP requests to an external REST API endpoint. Implement a function to POST chart images as multipart/form-data to '/analisar-grafico' endpoint, with the image file in a field named 'imagem'.
acceptanceCriteria: API service module exports a function that accepts an image file (File or Blob)
Function constructs multipart/form-data request with 'imagem' field containing the image
Function sends POST request to '/analisar-grafico' endpoint
Function returns a Promise that resolves to the parsed JSON response

requirements.text: Define TypeScript interfaces for the external API response schema. The response JSON must include: sinal (string: 'COMPRA' or 'VENDA'), tendencia (string: trend description), confianca (number: confidence percentage), padroes (array of strings: detected pattern names), and explicacao (string: textual explanation).

quotes:
API retorna JSON com:
   - sinal (COMPRA ou VENDA)
   - tendência
   - confiança
   - padrões detectados
   - explicação textual

acceptanceCriteria: TypeScript interface ApiAnalysisResponse defines all required fields with correct types
Interface includes sinal as 'COMPRA' | 'VENDA' literal type
Interface includes tendencia, confianca, padroes array, and explicacao fields
Interface is exported and used for type safety in API service module

requirements.text: Update ProcessingScreen.tsx to call the external API service when analysis starts. Send the uploaded chart image to the API, display the four processing stages ('Carregando imagem', 'Processando dados', 'Detectando padrões', 'Gerando resultado') while waiting for the response, handle API errors gracefully with Portuguese error messages, and navigate to the Results page with the API response data upon success.

quotes:
1. Usuário envia imagem do gráfico
2. App envia imagem para API REST
3. API retorna JSON

acceptanceCriteria: ProcessingScreen imports and calls the external API service function
Image data from route state is passed to API service
Processing stages animate during actual API request
API errors display user-friendly Portuguese messages
Success response navigates to Results page with API data
Loading states reflect real API request timing

requirements.text: Update Results.tsx to render analysis results received from the external API response. Map API response fields (sinal, tendencia, confianca, padroes, explicacao) to the existing UI components and display format, ensuring all Portuguese labels and formatting remain consistent.
acceptanceCriteria: Results page accepts and displays API response data structure
Signal (sinal) displays as COMPRA or VENDA with appropriate directional arrows
Confidence (confianca) displays as percentage
Trend (tendencia) displays with existing Portuguese formatting
Patterns (padroes) list displays detected pattern names
Explanation (explicacao) displays as descriptive text
All existing Portuguese labels and styling are preserved

requirements.text: Add configuration support for multiple external AI providers in the API service module. Create a configuration object or environment variable structure that allows switching between OpenAI ChatGPT Vision, Google Gemini Vision, or a custom Python backend endpoint without changing application code. Include placeholder endpoint URLs and prepare the API service to adapt request formats for different providers if needed.

quotes:
Deixar o app pronto para conectar com:
- OpenAI (ChatGPT Vision)
- Google Gemini Vision
- ou backend Python

acceptanceCriteria: API service module includes configuration for multiple AI provider endpoints
Configuration supports OpenAI, Google Gemini, and custom Python backend URLs
Provider selection mechanism allows easy switching (e.g., via environment variable or config file)
Code structure is prepared to handle provider-specific request formatting if needed
Default configuration points to a placeholder endpoint that can be replaced

requirements.text: Update the backend to remove or deprecate local analysis storage if it conflicts with the new external API flow. Ensure that analysis results returned by the external API can still be saved to the backend's history (backend/main.mo) by adapting the storage functions to accept externally-generated analysis data.

quotes: Separar frontend da lógica de IA

acceptanceCriteria: Backend analysis storage functions accept analysis data from external sources
No backend logic generates or processes analysis locally
History storage remains functional for externally-analyzed results
Backend serves as data persistence layer only, not analysis engine

requirements.text: Add error handling and retry logic to the API service for network failures, timeouts, and non-200 HTTP responses. Display Portuguese error messages to users when API requests fail (e.g., 'Erro ao conectar com o servidor', 'Tempo esgotado', 'Erro na análise').
acceptanceCriteria: API service catches network errors and HTTP error responses
User-friendly Portuguese error messages display for common failure scenarios
Retry logic attempts failed requests up to a reasonable limit
Timeout handling prevents indefinite waiting
ProcessingScreen shows error state with option to retry or go back

constraints: Do not modify files in frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
All user-facing text must remain in Portuguese (Brazil)
Maintain existing dark/light theme and minimalist visual design
Do not implement actual AI analysis logic in the frontend or backend
nonGoals: Implementing the actual external AI API server or endpoint
Providing API keys or credentials for OpenAI or Google Gemini
Creating Python backend for AI processing
Modifying the chart upload functionality or image capture mechanisms
Changing the Portuguese translations or UI language
Altering the timeframe options or settings screen structure
Implementing authentication or authorization for the external API
